adarkc.name:
WRATH RELIEF
55% DARK CHOCOLATE WITH ASHWAGANDHA HERBS

internalFeatures.title: ANCIENT HERBS
internalFeatures.text:
Infused with authentic Ayurvedic herbs like Ashwagandha, Brahmi, and
            Amla for targeted wellness.

internalFeatures.title: PURE COCOA
internalFeatures.text:
Hand-selected premium cocoa for a rich, velvety texture and deep,
            satisfying chocolate experience.

internalFeatures.title: ARTISAN CRAFTED
internalFeatures.text:
Small-batch production ensures maximum potency of herbs and artisanal
            quality in every bite.

internalFeatures.title: HEALING HERBS
internalFeatures.text: Traditional Ayurvedic formula with Neem and Tulsi for deep skin repair and natural healing.

internalFeatures.title: 100% NATURAL
internalFeatures.text: Zero chemicals or artificial preservatives. Just pure, nature-derived ingredients for healthy skin.

internalFeatures.title: SOOTHING RELIEF
internalFeatures.text: Provides an immediate soothing effect on wounds, rashes, and burns, creating a protective barrier.

internalFeatures.title: INSTANT VITALITY
internalFeatures.text: Concentrated herbal shots designed for fast absorption and immediate digestive wellness.

internalFeatures.title: TRADITIONAL CRAFT
internalFeatures.text: Crafted through traditional fermentation processes to enhance the potency of metabolic support.

internalFeatures.title: EASY WELLNESS
internalFeatures.text: Convenient, travel-friendly packaging makes it easy to maintain your health routine anywhere.
